sprints.name: Sprint 0 - Alignment and Guardrails
goals: Set up feature flags and observability baseline

sprints.name: Sprint 1 - Payments Data and Onboarding
goals: Add Stripe Connect account onboarding and status
Set up webhook verification and replay protection

sprints.name: Sprint 3 - Trust Gating and Ranking Outcomes
goals: Update ranking to include outcome metrics

sprints.name: Sprint 4 - Quality Controls and GTM Wedge
Sprint 5 - AI UX and KPI Hardening
goals: Integrate AI endpoints into role journeys
Polish trust UI and flow consistency

tasks.title: Approve take-rate monetization policy
acceptanceCriteria: Take-rate percentage and fee basis are documented
Policy approved by product and operations
Policy linked in roadmap docs

tasks.title: Add feature flags for payments and trust gating
acceptanceCriteria: Flags exist for payments flow and review gating
Default safe-off in production config
Flag states visible in admin/debug endpoint

tasks.title: Instrument payment and trust domain events
acceptanceCriteria: Event names defined for milestone/payment/payout/dispute/review unlock
Structured logs include correlation identifiers
Basic dashboards for event counts are available

tasks.title: Implement Prisma milestone/payment/payout/dispute schema
acceptanceCriteria: New enums and models added and migrated
Indexes and constraints align with schema plan
Migration dry-run passes in staging-like database

tasks.title: Add Stripe Connect onboarding and status endpoint
acceptanceCriteria: Developers can start onboarding flow
GET payout account status endpoint returns expected fields
Onboarding link regeneration is idempotent

tasks.title: Implement Stripe webhook signature verification and dedupe
acceptanceCriteria: Webhook signature is verified
Replay-safe idempotent event handling works
Failed webhook processing emits alertable error signal

tasks.title: Build create milestone endpoint on accepted hire requests
acceptanceCriteria: Client can create one milestone per accepted hire request
Validation enforces amount, currency, and ownership
Unauthorized creation attempts are rejected

tasks.title: Build fund milestone endpoint with idempotency
acceptanceCriteria: PaymentIntent is created and reconciled
Duplicate idempotency key does not duplicate charge
Milestone transitions to FUNDED only on successful payment

tasks.title: Build submit, release, and dispute milestone endpoints
acceptanceCriteria: Developer can submit funded milestone
Client can release submitted milestone
Either party can dispute and freeze release

tasks.title: Implement payout record creation on release
acceptanceCriteria: Release event creates payout record with net amount
Payout status lifecycle is tracked
Transfer provider ids are persisted

tasks.title: Add milestone flow UI for client and developer
acceptanceCriteria: Client can create/fund/release from hire-request screens
Developer can submit from delivery UI
Dispute action and state labels are visible

tasks.title: Gate review creation to released milestones
acceptanceCriteria: Review API validates linked released milestone
Review creation fails without released milestone
One review per milestone policy enforced

tasks.title: Expose identity, work, and code trust signals
acceptanceCriteria: Trust signals are present in developer profile payload
Work verified toggles only after released milestone
Signal semantics documented

tasks.title: Update ranking with completion and rating outcomes
acceptanceCriteria: Ranking factors include completion rate and average rating
Response includes explainable outcome factor breakdown
Feature-flag fallback to prior ranking is available

tasks.title: Extend anti-spam throttles for new accounts
acceptanceCriteria: Message and project creation limits vary by account age
Rate-limit responses are explicit and consistent
Policy thresholds are configurable

tasks.title: Implement flagged project queue and admin surface
acceptanceCriteria: Projects with weak signals are queued for review
Admin can view and resolve flagged items
Queue actions are auditable

tasks.title: Finalize niche GTM wedge and update discovery content
acceptanceCriteria: One wedge is selected and documented
Public discovery copy reflects wedge positioning
At least three niche case studies are published

tasks.title: Integrate AI recommendations into role workflows
acceptanceCriteria: Developer and client flows consume live AI endpoints
AI recommendations include explanation text
Loading and fallback behavior is production-safe

tasks.title: Wire KPI dashboards to authoritative backend metrics
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard cards use backend-computed metrics
Metric definitions are documented
No placeholder values on production routes

tasks.title: Polish trust and verification UI states
acceptanceCriteria: Identity/work/code trust signals are visually distinct
Tooltips explain verification meaning
Profile and discovery pages display consistent trust semantics

tasks.title: Run full release-readiness gate checks
acceptanceCriteria: All P0 gates in release checklist marked PASS or approved WAIVED
Go/no-go meeting completed with approvers
Post-release monitoring plan is active

tasks.title: Validate rollback and incident playbooks
acceptanceCriteria: Rollback drill executed for payments feature flag
Webhook failure incident drill completed
Runbook links are current and assigned
